hooks.command: c=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if printf '%s' "$c" | grep -Eq '(^|[^[:alnum:]])git[[:space:]]+commit([^[:alnum:]]|$)'; then echo '↪︎ Reminder: vorm Übergeben/Pushen lokal "npm run verify" laufen lassen (grüner Branch).' >&2; fi; exit 0
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.astro|*.css|*.ts|*.js|*.mjs) [ -f "$f" ] && npx prettier --write "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 ;; esac; exit 0
